places.name: Fort des Oliviers
places.description: A historic fort built to protect the southern coast of Haiti from invasions

places.name: Cannon
places.description: A relic of Haiti's historic battles, a testament to the fight for independence.

places.name: Bassin Bleu
places.description: A series of natural pools with turquoise waters, surrounded by lush vegetation.

places.name: Palais Sans Souci
places.description: The former residence of King Henri Christophe, now a UNESCO World Heritage site.

places.name: Port National Naturel
places.description: A nature reserve home to exceptional biodiversity and endemic species.

places.name: Ile de la Tortue
places.description: A former pirate stronghold, now a popular destination for its pristine beaches.

places.name: Ville de Jacmel
places.description: Famous for its carnival, vibrant artisan culture, and colonial architecture.
